calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Rennova Health, Inc. and CollabRx, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Steven M. Tindall, Esq. and Tyler Meade, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Clifford Baron, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Rennova Health, Inc. or CollabRx, Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on June 28, 2018 and served on June 29, 2018.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 31, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 28, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Clifford Baron, and against the Defaulted Defendants Rennova Health, Inc. and CollabRx, Inc., as follows:

Damages - $206,461.80.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,401.55.
Attorney Fees - $40,256.00.
Costs - $753.40.

Total - $252,872.75.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
